---
title: "CEL distribution grid — departments × top municipalities, 2001 vs 2024"
format: html
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

Population-weighted CEL distribution for each of Bolivia's nine departments,
broken out by the three most populous municipalities (by 2024 census population)
plus the remaining population. Each cell shows a stacked bar for 2001 (top) and
2024 (bottom). CEL half-steps (1.5 and 4.5) in the 2024 data are merged into
their adjacent integer levels for visual parity with the 2001 scale.

```{r}
#| label: setup
library(tidyverse)

DATA_DIR <- "../bolivia-data/Censo 2024/base_datos_csv_2024"
```

```{r}
#| label: load-data
albo_2001 <- readRDS("data-raw/albo_romero_autonomias_anexo1.rds")

cel_2024_all <- readRDS(file.path(DATA_DIR, "cel_geo.rds")) |>
  filter(!is.na(municipality), is.na(urban_rural)) |>
  mutate(cod_mun = sprintf("%02d%02d%02d", department, province, municipality))

pop <- readRDS("data/census_table_municipios_2012u.rds") |>
  select(cod.mun, mun_name = municipality, t_2001, t_2012)

dept_names <- c(
  "1" = "Chuquisaca", "2" = "La Paz", "3" = "Cochabamba",
  "4" = "Oruro",      "5" = "Potosi", "6" = "Tarija",
  "7" = "Santa Cruz", "8" = "Beni",   "9" = "Pando"
)
```

```{r}
#| label: build-long-data

# --- 2001: reshape to long CEL levels ---
cel_cols_2001 <- c(
  cel_0_nnn = "0", cel_1_nsn = "1", cel_2_nss = "2", cel_3_nss = "3",
  cel_4_snn = "4", cel_5_ssnc = "5", cel_6_sssc = "6", cel_7_sss = "7"
)

long_2001 <- albo_2001 |>
  left_join(pop |> select(cod.mun, mun_name, t_2001), by = c("codigo" = "cod.mun")) |>
  select(codigo, department, mun_name, t_2001, all_of(names(cel_cols_2001))) |>
  pivot_longer(cols = all_of(names(cel_cols_2001)), names_to = "var", values_to = "pct") |>
  mutate(cel = cel_cols_2001[var], year = "2001")

# --- 2024: reshape to long, merging half-steps for parity with 2001 ---
long_2024 <- cel_2024_all |>
  left_join(pop |> select(cod.mun, mun_name), by = c("cod_mun" = "cod.mun")) |>
  mutate(department = dept_names[as.character(department)]) |>
  select(cod_mun, department, mun_name, n_total,
         cel_0, cel_1, `cel_1.5`, cel_2, cel_3, cel_4, `cel_4.5`, cel_5, cel_6, cel_7) |>
  mutate(cel_1 = cel_1 + `cel_1.5`, cel_4 = cel_4 + `cel_4.5`) |>
  select(-`cel_1.5`, -`cel_4.5`) |>
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("cel_"), names_to = "var", values_to = "pct") |>
  mutate(cel = sub("cel_", "", var), year = "2024", codigo = cod_mun, pop_wt = n_total)

# Use n_total as the population weight for 2001 rows too
long_2001 <- long_2001 |> mutate(pop_wt = t_2001)

# --- Identify top 3 per department by 2024 population (n_total) ---
top3 <- cel_2024_all |>
  left_join(pop |> select(cod.mun, mun_name), by = c("cod_mun" = "cod.mun")) |>
  mutate(department = dept_names[as.character(department)]) |>
  distinct(cod_mun, department, mun_name, n_total) |>
  group_by(department) |>
  slice_max(n_total, n = 3) |>
  mutate(rank = row_number(desc(n_total))) |>
  ungroup() |>
  select(codigo = cod_mun, department, mun_name_top3 = mun_name, rank)

tag_slot <- function(df) {
  df |>
    left_join(top3 |> select(codigo, department, rank),
              by = c("codigo", "department")) |>
    mutate(
      slot = case_when(rank == 1 ~ "1st", rank == 2 ~ "2nd",
                       rank == 3 ~ "3rd", TRUE ~ "Rest"),
      slot = factor(slot, levels = c("1st", "2nd", "3rd", "Rest"))
    )
}

long_2001_tagged <- tag_slot(long_2001)
long_2024_tagged <- tag_slot(long_2024)

# Aggregate "Rest" as population-weighted average
agg_rest <- function(df) {
  top <- df |> filter(slot != "Rest")
  rest <- df |>
    filter(slot == "Rest") |>
    group_by(department, cel, year, slot) |>
    summarise(pct = weighted.mean(pct, pop_wt, na.rm = TRUE),
              mun_name = "Rest", .groups = "drop")
  bind_rows(top, rest)
}

combined <- bind_rows(agg_rest(long_2001_tagged), agg_rest(long_2024_tagged))

# Slot labels: municipality name for top 3 (from 2024 ranking)
slot_labels <- top3 |>
  mutate(slot = case_when(rank == 1 ~ "1st", rank == 2 ~ "2nd", rank == 3 ~ "3rd")) |>
  select(department, slot, mun_name = mun_name_top3) |>
  mutate(slot = factor(slot, levels = c("1st", "2nd", "3rd", "Rest"))) |>
  bind_rows(
    tibble(department = unique(top3$department),
           slot = factor("Rest", levels = c("1st", "2nd", "3rd", "Rest")),
           mun_name = "Rest")
  )

combined <- combined |>
  left_join(slot_labels |> rename(slot_label = mun_name),
            by = c("department", "slot"))

# Order departments by overall indigenous share (CEL ≥ 4 in 2001, pop-weighted)
dept_order <- albo_2001 |>
  left_join(pop |> select(cod.mun, t_2001), by = c("codigo" = "cod.mun")) |>
  group_by(department) |>
  summarise(score = weighted.mean(crit_orig_4a7, t_2001, na.rm = TRUE)) |>
  arrange(desc(score)) |>
  pull(department)

combined <- combined |>
  mutate(
    department = factor(department, levels = dept_order),
    cel = factor(cel, levels = as.character(0:7)),
    year = factor(year, levels = c("2024", "2001"))
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: shared-aesthetics
cel_colors_8 <- c(
  "0" = "#d9d9d9", "1" = "#fdb863", "2" = "#e08214", "3" = "#b35806",
  "4" = "#cce5ff", "5" = "#4393c3", "6" = "#2166ac", "7" = "#053061"
)

cel_labels_en <- c(
  "0" = "0 — No identity, no language",
  "1" = "1 — No identity, speaks",
  "2" = "2 — No identity, speaks + childhood (bilingual)",
  "3" = "3 — No identity, speaks + childhood (monolingual)",
  "4" = "4 — Identity only",
  "5" = "5 — Identity + language (no childhood)",
  "6" = "6 — Identity + language + childhood (bilingual)",
  "7" = "7 — Identity + language + childhood (monolingual)"
)

cel_labels_es <- c(
  "0" = "0 — Sin identidad, sin lengua",
  "1" = "1 — Sin identidad, habla",
  "2" = "2 — Sin identidad, habla + aprendió (bilingüe)",
  "3" = "3 — Sin identidad, habla + aprendió (monolingüe)",
  "4" = "4 — Solo identidad",
  "5" = "5 — Identidad + lengua (sin infancia)",
  "6" = "6 — Identidad + lengua + aprendió (bilingüe)",
  "7" = "7 — Identidad + lengua + aprendió (monolingüe)"
)

slot_names_en <- c("1st" = "1st largest", "2nd" = "2nd largest",
                   "3rd" = "3rd largest", "Rest" = "Remaining")

slot_names_es <- c("1st" = "1er municipio", "2nd" = "2do municipio",
                   "3rd" = "3er municipio", "Rest" = "Resto")

# Municipality-name annotations with 2024 population counts
top3_pop <- long_2024_tagged |>
  filter(slot != "Rest", cel == "0") |>
  distinct(department, slot, pop_wt)

rest_pop <- long_2024_tagged |>
  filter(slot == "Rest", cel == "0") |>
  group_by(department) |>
  summarise(pop_wt = sum(pop_wt, na.rm = TRUE), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(slot = factor("Rest", levels = c("1st", "2nd", "3rd", "Rest")))

all_pop <- bind_rows(top3_pop, rest_pop)

mun_labels <- combined |>
  distinct(department, slot, slot_label) |>
  left_join(all_pop, by = c("department", "slot")) |>
  mutate(
    pop_str = scales::comma(round(pop_wt)),
    label_text = if_else(slot == "Rest", "Rest", slot_label),
    label_full = paste0(label_text, "\n", pop_str)
  )

mun_labels_es <- mun_labels |>
  mutate(
    label_text = if_else(label_text == "Rest", "Resto", label_text),
    label_full = sub("^Rest\n", "Resto\n", label_full)
  )
```

:::{.column-page-inset}
```{r}
#| label: cel-grid-en
#| fig-height: 12
#| fig-width: 14

ggplot(combined, aes(x = pct / 100, y = year, fill = cel)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(
    data = mun_labels,
    aes(x = 0.5, y = 2.7, label = label_full),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 3, lineheight = 0.85, color = "grey10"
  ) +
  facet_grid(
    department ~ slot,
    switch = "y",
    labeller = labeller(slot = slot_names_en)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cel_colors_8, labels = cel_labels_en, name = "CEL") +
  labs(
    title = "CEL distribution by department and municipality — 2001 vs 2024",
    subtitle = "Top 3 municipalities by 2024 population + remaining (pop-weighted avg)",
    x = "Share of population", y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    strip.text.y.left = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 1, face = "bold", size = 9),
    strip.text.x = element_text(size = 10, face = "italic", color = "grey30",
                                margin = margin(t = 15, b = 10)),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.key.width = unit(0.5, "cm"),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.3, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0.5, "lines"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 15, r = 5, b = 5, l = 5)
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 2)) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off")
```
:::

:::{.column-page-inset}
```{r}
#| label: cel-grid-es
#| fig-height: 12
#| fig-width: 14

ggplot(combined, aes(x = pct / 100, y = year, fill = cel)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(
    data = mun_labels_es,
    aes(x = 0.5, y = 2.7, label = label_full),
    inherit.aes = FALSE, size = 3, lineheight = 0.85, color = "grey10"
  ) +
  facet_grid(
    department ~ slot,
    switch = "y",
    labeller = labeller(slot = slot_names_es)
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), breaks = c(0, 0.5, 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = cel_colors_8, labels = cel_labels_es, name = "CEL") +
  labs(
    title = "Distribución CEL por departamento y municipio — 2001 vs 2024",
    subtitle = "3 municipios más poblados (población 2024) + resto (promedio ponderado)",
    x = "Proporción de la población", y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    strip.text.y.left = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 1, face = "bold", size = 9),
    strip.text.x = element_text(size = 10, face = "italic", color = "grey30",
                                margin = margin(t = 15, b = 10)),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.key.width = unit(0.5, "cm"),
    panel.spacing.x = unit(0.3, "lines"),
    panel.spacing.y = unit(0.5, "lines"),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    plot.margin = margin(t = 15, r = 5, b = 5, l = 5)
  ) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 2)) +
  coord_cartesian(clip = "off")
```
:::
